content_body: We had a wonderful time exploring the area and hanging our in the cabin. We grilled a steak and mushrooms almost every night. We made it to the Swan Drive-in double feature - definitely a must for all future trips to Blue Ridge. We walked down the path to the railroad tracks, went about .1 miles to the right, and found a beautiful riverfront park. We tied some rafts to a tree and relaxed in the Toccoa River. During this magical picnic, the most amazing man in the world asked me to marry him. Best day ever! There is good sightseeing in Helen. The orchard tours are weekends only, but Bear Claw Vineyards is open all week. We played piano in the Treehouse and relaxed with a surprisingly difficult puzzle. This is a beautiful area and a great escape. (I said YES!!)
title: A Magical Week and Proposal at Mayfly Lodge
